Contraception is technology and methods used to stop [[pregnancy]] from happening during sexual activity

While reproduction is strongly valued in [[Lifeism]] contraception is seen not merely as a right but a duty for anyone not in the [[Alpha Covenant]].

[[IUDs]] are considered the best form of contraception and recomended by [[fatwa]] for every afab starting at puberty

Ideally no children until [[coronation]]

[[Category:Medicine]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
